description: Corpus's SECOND explicit triple-thesis triangle, after the BFZ triangle (Kozilek's Sentinel + Reckless Cohort + Serene Steward). 3-way mutual mirror via ## Connections, one card per axis. Labor anchor (Immobilizer Eldrazi) sourced from Scryfall flavor text 'It denied the Zendikari the chance to stand and die fighting' + the canonical Eldrazi-overhead/Zendikari-kneeling composition; Potion-rule discipline visibly applied — the canonical visual carries the labor-relation via composition, BBL reads the apparatus-of-extraction overlay on top, no hub-attribution claims labor as canonical-thesis. Rebellion anchor (Make a Stand) sourced from Scryfall flavor + indestructible-until-end-of-turn oracle text encoding impermanent-unity. Stewardship anchor (Affa Protector) sourced from MTG Wiki Affa-underground-refuge lore + flavor text + Vigilance oracle. The OGW triangle pairs canonically with the BFZ triangle as a 6-card BFZ+OGW Zendikari-resistance cluster — that cross-set cycle is a future zendikari-resistance.md Mr. Nodeley candidate but premature this wave.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Zendikar — Affa settlement underground-refuge during Eldrazi invasion]
notes: Triangle is the rarest and most structurally satisfying topology. Edgelord's most respectful mood applies.

OGW Eldrazi cards (95, 97, 99, 94) have NO ## Trivia section yet — wave 78 trivia pass for these is in flight. The triangle did not wait for those; the Immobilizer Eldrazi anchor cites Scryfall flavor_text directly (canonical Wizards-published evidence) plus the canonical Vision-pass composition. No claim depends on text not yet written.

Potion-rule discipline applied throughout: the Immobilizer Eldrazi bullet explicitly writes 'BBL reads the composition as the labor-relation rendered as visual primitive' — overlay-named, no canonical-thesis-projected. The card's hub-attribution remains [labor] only (per parent dispatch), not [apparatus-of-extraction] (BBL's lens-noun, not a hub).

Future Mr. Nodeley trigger logged: zendikari-resistance.md as a 6-card BFZ+OGW cross-set cycle-node, anchor-able if a 4th OGW Zendikari-resistance card enters corpus enriched (Kor Sky Climber OGW-24 is the obvious candidate — currently in corpus, vision pending per the [[kor]] node).
